title: Urinary Tract Infection Basics
license_notes: Use as government source support for UTI basics and antibiotic stewardship. Avoid implying CDC endorses local discharge wording.
supports: Bladder infection is the most common type of urinary tract infection.
Antibiotics are used to treat UTIs when a clinician determines they are needed.
Clinicians determine the appropriate antibiotic based on the patient and infection.
